description: You are a QA Lead managing the release process. A regression test suite has just completed 5 runs. Build #3 of the 'regression-test-suite' job has been identified as the stable release candidate. Update Build #3's display name to 'RC-v2.1.0' and set its description to 'Release Candidate v2.1.0 - All regression tests passed. Approved by QA team for staging deployment.' Additionally, pin the build to keep it forever and prevent deletion by log rotation. Do not modify any other builds.
